title: DUCKIEZ Single button water game. Unicorn, Flamingo, Dinosaur and Ocean. 1 of 3 designs. Design picked at random. Perfect Party bag filler. (Flamingo, 24, Count)
features: Engaging Design: Colourful underwater scene featuring a smiling fish, bubbles, and other marine creatures to captivate young minds.
Compact Size: Portable single-button water game in a compact case, perfect for travel or as a party favour.
Random Designs: One of three delightful designs (Unicorn, Flamingo, Dinosaur, or Ocean) selected at random for a fun surprise.
Easy Operation: Simple single-button control for easy play, suitable for small hands.
Durable Construction: Sturdy plastic casing designed to withstand the rigours of childhood play.
description: Product description Dive into an underwater wonderland with this delightful water game! Featuring a whimsical design, this toy showcases a vibrant yellow fish with a crown, surrounded by colourful bubbles and playful sea creatures. Ideal for bath time or pool play, this engaging game allows children to press the button and watch the mesmerising water effects unfold. Compact and portable, it makes a perfect party bag filler or travel companion. Crafted with care, this water game promises hours of aquatic adventures and imaginative fun. Please note that the specific design (Unicorn, Flamingo, Dinosaur or Ocean) is selected at random. Recommended for children ages 3 and up. Dimensions: 14 cm x 7 cm x 2 cm. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under the age of 3. Small parts chocking hazard.
